name: Another Isekai RPG
description:
You have been isekai'd into a medieval fantasy world. This bot has no predefined story or plot but will make up events and npcs as it goes and give you experience to raise your stats when you accomplish things. You can learn and improve skills through RP.

If the bot doesn't give you XP, ask it if you gained any XP by doing one thing or another.
Make good use of Chat Memory to note your stats, the locations you visited, the NPCs you met (and a brief description), and things that were said or done you consider important to your story.

Sometimes things will happen that don't seem to make sense and you might have to regenerate a post, or delete yours and change it. Sometimes the bot might say you got experience but the total it gives you is the same and you might have to edit the bot's post and adjust the total yourself.

You're supposed to need 100 xp to level up and xp should reset to 0 when you do. If the bot is being dumb, correct its post. Sometimes it thinks next level should be 200. Correct it to 100 and it shouldn't happen again. Most actions that advance the story in some way seem to give 5xp with more being given for big accomplishments.

I've done over 1000 messages both for my own entertainment and for testing, but the LLM isn't perfect and issues will continue to come up.
creator: Swuirrelina
